_note: The notional product development lifecycle: stages and their key activities — the SKELETON of the spine (ids, names, order, hue, tagline). Editorial PROSE (canon + the editor's note) lives in content/phases/<id>.md and is merged into the compiled snapshot by `npm run build-content`. Edit either, then run build-content to recompile + validate. ids are stable references used by use cases and by the phase prose files — keep them stable when renaming. Phase numbers and soft tints derive automatically; hue may be omitted to auto-assign from the palette.

phases.name: Discover
phases.tagline: Understand the problem and decide what to build.

phases.name: Build
phases.tagline: Design, prototype, and ship the thing.

phases.name: Grow
phases.tagline: Launch, learn, and keep it running.
